nodes.text: Hello there! Welcome to the world of Pokemon!
My name is Oak. People call me the Pokemon Professor.
This world is inhabited by creatures called Pokemon!
For some people, Pokemon are pets. Others use them for fights.
Myself... I study Pokemon as a profession.
Now, which Pokemon would you like to start with?
Ah, Bulbasaur! An excellent choice! Take good care of it!
Charmander, the fire type! A spirited choice!
Squirtle! A fine Water-type Pokemon! Treat it well!
Good morning, sweetie! Are you heading out on your adventure?
Make sure to visit Professor Oak's lab before you leave town.
Be careful out there! And don't forget to call!
Hey! I'm Blue, Professor Oak's grandson.
Gramps said he had a Pokemon for me too!
I'll pick the one that's stronger than yours! Smell ya later!
The tall grass is full of wild Pokemon!
You'll need your own Pokemon to safely pass through.
Welcome to Pallet Town!
This is a small and quiet town. Professor Oak's lab is to the north.
Welcome to the Pokemon Center!
Would you like me to heal your Pokemon?
OK, I'll take your Pokemon for a moment...
Your Pokemon are fighting fit! We hope to see you again!
OK! We hope to see you again!
